project_privacy_data_flows.description: User saves article for offline reading. Article content, images, and metadata stored locally via OkHttp offline cache interceptor and Room database. Uses WAKE_LOCK and WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.

flow_steps.details: User taps save icon to cache article for offline reading.
OkHttp interceptor that caches API responses for offline use. Saves article content, images, and CSS to local cache.
Background service that syncs saved pages and manages offline content. Uses Room database to track saved state.
Room database persists saved page metadata, including page IDs, titles, and download state.
Wake lock acquired during background sync to prevent device sleep while downloading content for offline reading.
